_comment: Hand-crafted syntax-highlight additions merged into the Langium-generated grammar by scripts/merge-syntax.mjs after every `pnpm langium:generate`.

builtin-types.comment: Primitive and standard-library type names everywhere in the file
builtin-types.name: support.type.builtin.codelang

type-annotation.comment: Highlight the type reference that follows ':' in declarations, parameters, and return positions

type-parameters.comment: Generic type-parameter list between < > after an identifier. Handles bounds like <A extends Any[] | Any, R>.

patterns.comment: 'extends' inside a type-parameter bound is a constraint operator, not a control-flow keyword
patterns.name: keyword.operator.type-constraint.codelang

patterns.comment: Union operator between bound alternatives: Any[] | Any
patterns.name: keyword.operator.type.union.codelang

patterns.comment: Array/tuple suffix on a bound atom: Any[]
patterns.name: storage.modifier.array.codelang

patterns.comment: PascalCase identifiers inside <> are concrete type names (Buffer, Callable, …)
patterns.name: entity.name.type.codelang

patterns.comment: Short lowercase identifiers are type-parameter variables (A, R, T, K, V, …)
patterns.name: variable.other.type-parameter.codelang
